prose: **Furan Fukui reactivity descriptors** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitting via RIJK) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: provided by `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz`, single-point only (no geometry optimization). Mulliken partial charges (PySCF) used to compute the Fukui indices. SCF converged; no warnings reported. The computed atomic Fukui plus indices (f⁺) are: O(1) = −1.3316182, C(2) = 1.2286866, C(3) = 1.2270264, C(4) = 1.9233053, C(5) = 1.9242931, H(6) = −1.2190639, H(7) = −1.2191056, H(8) = −0.7667831, H(9) = −0.7667406. The most electrophilic site is atom 5 (C) with f⁺ = 1.9242931. The most nucleophilic site is also atom 5 (C) with f⁻ = 0.1616371.
